attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
BK_AMEX_PNR_LOCATOR_ID,
BK_AMEX_CUSTOMER_ID,
BK_AMEX_PAX_SEQUENCE_INT,
BK_AMEX_GDS_CD,
BK_BOOKING_SEGMENT_SEQ_NUM_INT,
SEGMENT_ARRIVAL_DTM,
SEGMENT_DEPARTURE_DTM,
RU_PASSAGE_ORIGN_RAIL_STN_CD,
RU_PASSAGE_DESTN_RAIL_STN_CD,
SEGMENT_FARE_REPORTING_AMT,
SEGMENT_FARE_LOCAL_AMT,
RU_FLIGHT_ORGN_IATA_AIRPORT_CD,
SEGMENT_CONNECT_WAIT_MINS_CNT,
RU_FLIGHT_DSTN_IATA_AIRPORT_CD,
SEGMENT_ELAPSED_MINUTES_CNT,
SEGMENT_DOMESTIC_INTRNTNL_CD,
SEGMENT_STATUS_CD,
SEGMENT_CONNECTION_FLG,
REWARDS_PROGRAM_NUM,
MEAL_SERVED_FLG,
SEGMENT_SEAT_NUM,
SEGMENT_MILES_CNT,
BOOKING_SEGMENT_TYPE,
LOCAL_CURRENCY_CD,
BK_CLASS_OF_SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
FARE_TYPE_CD,
REPORTING_CURRENCY_CD,
SEGMENT_ORIGIN_ISO_COUNTRY_CD,
SEGMENT_DEST_ISO_COUNTRY_CD,
WAITLIST_ROLE,
RU_FLIGHT_NUM,
RU_FLIGHT_EQUIPMENT_CD,
RU_FLIGHT_SEAT_TYPE_CD,
RU_FLIGHT_FARE_BASIS_CD,
RU_FLIGHT_SERVICE_CLASS_CD,
RU_IATA_AIRLINE_CD,
RU_SEGMENT_WAITLIST_STATUS_CD,
RU_SEGMENT_WAITLIST_CARRIER_CD,
RU_TRAIN_NUM,
RU_AMEX_RAIL_CARRIER_CD
FROM
 $$WORKDB.W_AMEX_TRAVEL_BKG_SEGMENT_DTL  WATBSD
where 
not exists 
 ( SELECT 1  FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AMEX_TRAVEL_BKG_SEGMENT_DTL  NATBSD
 where WATBSD.BK_AMEX_PNR_LOCATOR_ID	=NATBSD.BK_AMEX_PNR_LOCATOR_ID
AND WATBSD.BK_AMEX_CUSTOMER_ID          =NATBSD.BK_AMEX_CUSTOMER_ID
AND WATBSD.BK_AMEX_PAX_SEQUENCE_INT     =NATBSD.BK_AMEX_PAX_SEQUENCE_INT
AND WATBSD.BK_AMEX_GDS_CD		=NATBSD.BK_AMEX_GDS_CD
AND WATBSD.BK_BOOKING_SEGMENT_SEQ_NUM_INT         =NATBSD.BK_BOOKING_SEGMENT_SEQ_NUM_INT 
)
